pages.title: BTC Daytrade Tycoon — Project Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to the project: what it is, why it exists, the core TimeWarp concept, tech stack summary, and links to all major sections of the wiki.

pages.title: Getting Started & Project Setup
pages.purpose: How to clone, install dependencies, run the dev server, run tests, and deploy. Covers package.json scripts, Next.js config, environment requirements, and the Vercel deployment target.

pages.title: Repository Structure & Conventions
pages.purpose: Explains the directory layout (src/app, src/components, src/hooks, src/store, src/lib, src/utils, src/types, e2e), naming conventions, 'use client' guards, SSR hydration safety patterns, and the middleware setup.

pages.title: Simulation Engine
pages.purpose: Overview of the TimeWarp simulation system — how historical Binance data is fetched, normalized, and replayed at 60× speed. Links to child pages covering the engine hook, data pipeline, and market metrics.

pages.title: useTimewarpEngine Hook
pages.purpose: Deep dive into the core simulation loop: random date selection, SPEED_MULTIPLIER (60×), TICK_MS (100ms), HISTORY_OFFSET_CANDLES (30), the setInterval tick loop, price interpolation, dynamic data loading (appendMoreCandles), and the window.__timewarpEngine debug interface.

pages.title: Binance API & Data Pipeline
pages.purpose: Covers src/lib/binance-api.ts: fetchCurrentPrice, fetchCandles (2-batch strategy for ~2000 candles), normalizeCandlesToBasePrice (price scaling to current BTC), interpolatePrice (linear interpolation between candles), calculateTrend (SMA20), and calculateVolatility.

page_notes.content:
Continuous Data Fetching
During active simulation, the engine monitors remaining data and fetches additional candles when needed:

pages.title: Market Metrics & Volatility
pages.purpose: Explains how market trend (bull/bear/neutral via SMA20), volatility (max-min/avg over 24 candles), and price history (rolling 50-point buffer) are computed and fed into the Zustand store. Covers src/utils/volatilityEngine.ts and src/hooks/useMarketVolatility.ts.

pages.title: State Management (Zustand Store)
pages.purpose: Overview of the centralized Zustand trading store — its shape, persistence strategy, and role as the single source of truth for wallet, position, price, and session state. Links to child pages for trading logic and position mechanics.

pages.title: tradingStore — Store Shape & Persistence
pages.purpose: Documents the full TradingStore interface: all state fields (wallet, position, closedTrades, isLiquidated, simulationRealDate, hasSeenOnboarding, marketTrend, volatility, priceHistory, etc.), the 'trading-storage' localStorage key, persist middleware configuration, and the window.__tradingStore debug hook.

pages.title: Position Mechanics & Trading Logic
pages.purpose: Explains all store actions: openPosition (margin deduction, liquidation price calc), closePosition (PnL settlement, wallet update), checkPosition (TP/SL/liquidation monitoring on every tick), updatePositionSize (weighted average entry), updateLeverage (margin recalculation). Covers the liquidation formula and PnL formula.

pages.title: Trading Interface (UI Components)
pages.purpose: Overview of the main /trading page layout and all its constituent components. Describes the desktop 12-column grid vs. mobile tabbed layout. Links to child pages for each major UI area.

pages.title: TradingPage & Layout Orchestration
pages.purpose: Documents src/app/trading/page.tsx: mounted hydration guard, useTimewarpEngine integration, useTradingStore selectors, desktop grid layout (TradingChart + TradeHistory in main column; OrderBook + PositionPanel + TradeControls + PnLDisplay in sidebar), mobile fallback to MobileTradingView, and modal orchestration (Onboarding, Liquidation, EndSimulation).

pages.title: TradeControls Component
pages.purpose: Deep dive into TradeControls.tsx: Simple vs. Advanced mode, leverage pills (2×–100×), size slider with dynamic sliderMax, TP/SL inputs, handleOpen execution flow (margin check → high-leverage intercept → openPosition dispatch), position adjustment logic (INCREASE/DECREASE based on sizeDiff), and the ConfirmHighLeverageModal integration.

pages.title: PositionPanel & PnL Display
pages.purpose: Covers PositionPanel.tsx (real-time uPnL, margin, distance-to-liquidation, Risk Gauge with safe/dangerous/critical states, animate-pulse-glow, manual close button) and PnLDisplay.tsx (total equity, session PnL, win rate, best/worst trade). Explains barPercent normalization and maxDistance = 100/leverage.

pages.title: Chart, Order Book & Trade History
pages.purpose: Documents TradingChart.tsx (lightweight-charts v5 integration, candlestick series, liquidation price line overlay, crypto-themed colors), the synthetic OrderBook component, and TradeHistory.tsx (closed trades list, reason icons, pnlPercent calculation, reverse-chronological display).

pages.title: SimulationClock Component
pages.purpose: Documents SimulationClock.tsx: SimulationClockProps interface (elapsedTime, speed, isPlaying, realDateRange, onPause/onResume/onReset/onEnd callbacks), the Speed Badge, Historical Start display, playback toggle logic, and the End/New session management buttons.

pages.title: Modals & UX Flows
pages.purpose: Overview of all modal dialogs and the user flows they govern. Links to child pages for each modal type.

pages.title: Onboarding & High-Leverage Modals
pages.purpose: Documents OnboardingModal.tsx (3-step tutorial: TimeWarp concept, Blind Date principle, leverage warning; hasSeenOnboarding flag; setOnboardingSeen action) and ConfirmHighLeverageModal.tsx (triggered at leverage ≥ 50×, pendingTrade buffer, skipHighLeverageWarning flag).

pages.title: Liquidation & End-Simulation Modals
pages.purpose: Documents LiquidationModal.tsx (Framer Motion shake animation, ACCOUNT LIQUIDATED state, real historical date reveal, New Session flow calling engine.reset() + clearLiquidated()) and EndSimulationModal.tsx (manual end, session stats: PnL, winRate, returnPercent, formatElapsedPretty, real date range reveal).

pages.title: Supporting Pages & Navigation
pages.purpose: Overview of the non-trading pages: Landing, Auth, Leaderboard, and Achievements. Covers the Header and MarketStatus layout components.

pages.title: Landing Page & Authentication
pages.purpose: Documents LandingPage.tsx (marketing copy, feature showcase for TimeWarp/Blind Date/Real Leverage, CTAs to /auth/login and /trading), AuthPage.tsx (login/signup modes, setFakeUser integration, Guest/Demo bypass), and src/lib/fake-auth.ts (localStorage key 'ctp-auth-user', getFakeUser/setFakeUser/clearFakeUser).

pages.title: Leaderboard, Achievements & Layout Components
pages.purpose: Documents RankingPage.tsx (podium layout, leaderboard list, time filters, 'Your Position' card), AchievementsPage.tsx (Achievement interface, rarity tiers, progress bars), Header.tsx (navigation links), and MarketStatus.tsx (live price sparkline, volatility badge, trend indicator).

pages.title: UI Primitives & Design System
pages.purpose: Overview of the custom crypto-themed design system built on Tailwind CSS and Radix UI primitives. Links to child pages for the theme tokens and the component library.

pages.title: Crypto Theme & Tailwind Configuration
pages.purpose: Documents the custom Tailwind color palette (crypto-bg, crypto-surface, crypto-long, crypto-short, crypto-accent, crypto-warning, etc.), custom shadows (glow-long, glow-short), keyframe animations (pulse-glow, shake, ticker-up, slide-in), CSS utility classes (card-surface, risk-gradient, btn-long, btn-short, mono-number, text-glow-*), and globals.css custom properties.

pages.title: Radix UI / shadcn Component Library
pages.purpose: Documents the reusable UI primitives in src/components/ui/: Button, Badge, Card, Dialog, Slider, Input, Label, Form, Checkbox, DropdownMenu, ScrollArea, Separator, Sheet, Skeleton, Switch, Table, Tabs, Textarea, Toast/Toaster, Tooltip, ProgressBar, DataTable. Explains the class-variance-authority (CVA) pattern and the cn() utility from src/lib/utils.ts.

pages.title: Custom Hooks Reference
pages.purpose: Overview of all custom React hooks outside the simulation engine. Links to child pages for trading hooks and utility hooks.

pages.title: Trading & Market Hooks
pages.purpose: Documents useTradingEngine.ts (legacy compatibility layer), useBinancePrice.ts (WebSocket connection to Binance stream for live price/24h change), useMarketVolatility.ts (volatility state management), and useKeyboardShortcuts.ts (L=Long, S=Short, X=Close keyboard bindings).

pages.title: Utility Hooks
pages.purpose: Documents useIsMobile (responsive breakpoint detection for MobileTradingView), useLocalStorage (SSR-safe localStorage wrapper), and useToast (toast notification system built on Radix UI Toast).

pages.title: Testing
pages.purpose: Overview of the two-layer testing strategy (Playwright E2E + Vitest unit tests). Links to child pages for E2E specs and unit test coverage.

pages.title: Playwright E2E Test Suite
pages.purpose: Documents all four E2E specs: trading.spec.ts (TRADING-01: full simulation journey, onboarding skip, chart advancing, pause, new session), date-reveal.spec.ts (DATE-REVEAL: blind date enforcement, end-session reveal, liquidation reveal via __tradingStore injection), manual-trading.spec.ts (position lifecycle: open/increase/decrease/close), production-bar.spec.ts (distance-bar smoke test on Vercel). Covers playwright.config.ts (two projects: chromium local + production Vercel), _helper.ts (saveEvidence screenshot/HTML capture), and localStorage seeding patterns.
